---
name: Voice Style Request
about: Request a new built-in voice style preset
title: "[Voice] "
labels: voice, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Voice Description
Describe the voice character you want (e.g., "British female narrator," "deep male announcer").

## Use Case
What content would this voice be used for? (podcast, narration, ads, tutorials, etc.)

## Language
Which language(s) should this voice support?

## Reference Audio (Optional)
Link to a voice style that captures the character you're looking for.
